title: Add machine support for more Linux distros
body:
Since `qemu-kvm` symlink is only available in Fedora

Fixes:

```
Error: exec: "qemu-kvm": executable file not found in $PATH
```

KVM is still hard-coded.

comments.body:
Hmm, need a machine on other architecture:

```
qemu-system-aarch64: -accel kvm: No machine specified, and there is no default
```

I think I will split the `arm64` out in a separate PR, it was in a very half-baked state.

So it was just not the qemu-system-aarch64 that was missing, but podman support.

i.e. all builds disabled, obsolete hardcoded path, etc

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9846

>  Please squash commits, and needs [NO TESTS NEEDED]

Ah, you mean to the actual commit itself and not just to the PR

@afbjorklund i still had this in mind to do but thanks for the PR!
